title: Non-record: Entropy-aware Int5-odd BTT-MLP with materialized eval
author: LucasErcolano

data.description: Structured TT/BTT-inspired MLP using a 2-core StructuredLinear in the MLP while keeping attention dense.

parameters.path: structured MLP materialized to dense weights for validation

data.description: Entropy-aware training objective aligned to the exported int5_odd + zlib artifact using a 5-bin odd grid {-2,-1,0,1,2}.

novel_contributions: Entropy-aware training aligned to an int5_odd export objective
TT/BTT-inspired structured MLP with dense attention
Evaluation-time materialization of structured MLP weights for fast validation
Rank-aware DDP data sharding and cloud launch helpers
